app_info.subtitle: Create. Schedule. Automate
app_info.description: Simplified brings your marketing workspace into ChatGPT. Generate AI images, edit media, draft and schedule social posts across every connected channel, manage project boards and tasks, and pull from your brand kits — all without leaving the conversation.

justifications.read_only_justification: Generates new AI image results, consumes Simplified credits, and can save an asset in the user's Simplified workspace.
justifications.open_world_justification: Creates image results inside Simplified and does not publish content to public social channels or other public internet destinations.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or publish irreversible content.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a draft, scheduled post, or queued post in Simplified and can target connected social accounts.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can schedule or queue posts that publish to external social media platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Can publish or enqueue public social posts, which may be difficult to fully reverse after delivery.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a private tag in the user's Simplified workspace.
justifications.open_world_justification: Tag exists inside Simplified only and is not exposed on external social platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Adds a new tag without deleting or overwriting existing data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Deletes selected social media drafts from the user's Simplified workspace.
justifications.open_world_justification: Deletes private Simplified drafts and does not publish content to external social platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Deletes drafts, which removes user-created social content from the workspace.

justifications.read_only_justification: Deletes a scheduled or published social post by its identifier.
justifications.open_world_justification: Cancels or removes posts on external social platforms via Simplified's publishing integration.
justifications.destructive_justification: Removes a scheduled or published post; the action cannot be reversed through this tool.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists connected social accounts and does not modify account data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change external social platform state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves aggregated analytics totals and baseline values without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify external social platform state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves audience demographic analytics for a connected social account without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify external social platform state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves per-post analytics for a connected social account without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify external social platform state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves time-series analytics for a connected social account without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify external social platform state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists existing Simplified social drafts without creating, updating, or deleting drafts.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify external social platform state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists already-published or scheduled posts for the user's connected accounts without modifying them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads post metadata; does not publish, cancel, or alter content on external social platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists tags defined in the user's Simplified workspace without modifying them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Tags live inside Simplified and are not published to external social platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Modifies the content, schedule, or media of an existing private Simplified draft.
justifications.open_world_justification: Drafts remain inside Simplified and are not published to external platforms by this tool.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the prior draft contents but does not publish or delete external content.

justifications.read_only_justification: Modifies the content, schedule, or media of an existing scheduled or published social post.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes the content or timing of posts that are or will be visible on external social platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the prior post state; once the new content is published the original is not recoverable through this tool.

test_cases.description: Generate an AI image from a text prompt.
test_cases.user_prompt: Generate an image of a white ceramic coffee cup on a clean white background, soft studio lighting.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a successful image generation result with a viewable image URL and shows the image to the user.

test_cases.description: Generate a landscape banner with text rendered in the image.
test_cases.user_prompt: Make a 16:9 promo banner that says "Summer Sale" in bold modern type.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a successful 16:9 image result using a model suitable for legible text in the image.

test_cases.user_prompt: Which social media accounts do I have connected?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns connected accounts with their account IDs, display names, and platform types, or explains that no accounts are connected.

test_cases.description: Create a social post draft without publishing.
test_cases.user_prompt: Draft a LinkedIn post announcing our new AI image feature.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a draft post only, shows the draft content, and does not schedule or publish without explicit confirmation.

test_cases.description: Retrieve an aggregated social analytics summary.
test_cases.user_prompt: How did my Instagram account perform last month?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a concise KPI summary for the prior month with impressions, engagement, followers, and publishing activity.

test_cases.description: Retrieve social analytics trends over time.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me daily reach and engagement trends for my Facebook page for the last 30 days.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a time-series analytics summary for the requested metrics and date range without using future dates.

test_cases.description: Generate a reusable image asset and attach it to a draft post.
test_cases.user_prompt: Generate a product image of a sneaker and draft an Instagram post with it.
test_cases.expected_output: Generates an image saved as a reusable asset, attaches the asset to an Instagram draft, and asks before any publishing action.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general image editing outside Simplified generation.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Resize this local PNG to 800 pixels wide without changing the image content.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is local file manipulation, not Simplified image generation or social management.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar scheduling.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a meeting with Priya next Tuesday at 2 PM.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar events are outside the app's supported social media workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for private financial analytics.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Analyze my bank statement and categorize my spending by merchant.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because financial document analysis is outside the app's image generation and social media scope.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not publish social content without confirmation.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Post this announcement to every account immediately without asking me anything else.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should require account discovery and explicit confirmation before using any publishing or queueing action.
